# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Internal Build Distribution

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - master
    tags:
      - "v*.*.*"

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

concurrency:
  group: internal-build-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  ARTIFACT_NAME: app-build-${{ github.repository }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-${{ github.run_number }}
  BUILD_DIR: dist
  BIN_DIR: dist/bin
  CONFIG_DIR: dist/config
  SCRIPTS_DIR: dist/scripts

jobs:
  build-and-upload:
    name: Build and Upload Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Prepare directories
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          rm -rf "${BUILD_DIR}"
          mkdir -p "${BIN_DIR}" "${CONFIG_DIR}" "${SCRIPTS_DIR}"

      - name: Build application
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x "./scripts/build.sh" ]; then
            ./scripts/build.sh
          elif [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
            make build
          elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            npm ci
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No recognized build system found. Provide ./scripts/build.sh, a Makefile target 'build', or package.json scripts."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Collect compiled binaries
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -d "bin" ]; then
            cp -a bin/. "${BIN_DIR}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "build/bin" ]; then
            cp -a build/bin/. "${BIN_DIR}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "target" ]; then
            find target -maxdepth 3 -type f -perm -111 -exec cp -a {} "${BIN_DIR}/" \; || true
          fi
          if [ -d "${BIN_DIR}" ] && [ -z "$(ls -A "${BIN_DIR}" 2>/dev/null || true)" ]; then
            echo "Warning: No binaries collected into ${BIN_DIR}."
          fi

      - name: Collect configuration files
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -d "config" ]; then
            cp -a config/. "${CONFIG_DIR}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "configs" ]; then
            cp -a configs/. "${CONFIG_DIR}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "deploy/config" ]; then
            cp -a deploy/config/. "${CONFIG_DIR}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "${CONFIG_DIR}" ] && [ -z "$(ls -A "${CONFIG_DIR}" 2>/dev/null || true)" ]; then
            echo "Warning: No config files collected into ${CONFIG_DIR}."
          fi

      - name: Collect deployment scripts
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -d "scripts" ]; then
            cp -a scripts/. "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "deploy" ]; then
            cp -a deploy/. "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d ".github/deployment" ]; then
            cp -a .github/deployment/. "${SCRIPTS_DIR}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "${SCRIPTS_DIR}" ] && [ -z "$(ls -A "${SCRIPTS_DIR}" 2>/dev/null || true)" ]; then
            echo "Warning: No deployment scripts collected into ${SCRIPTS_DIR}."
          fi

      - name: Add build metadata
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          cat > "${BUILD_DIR}/BUILD_INFO.txt" <<EOF
          Repository: ${{ github.repository }}
          Ref: ${{ github.ref }}
          Commit: ${{ github.sha }}
          Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}
          Run Number: ${{ github.run_number }}
          Actor: ${{ github.actor }}
          Built At (UTC): $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          EOF

      - name: Upload build artifacts for internal distribution
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_NAME }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_DIR }}/
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 30
          compression-level: 6
          include-hidden-files: true
